# Resource: okta_user_risk

Manages a user's risk level in Okta. This resource allows you to set and manage the risk level for a specific user.

## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "okta_user_risk" "example" {
  user_id    = okta_user.example.id
  risk_level = "HIGH"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `risk_level` (String) Risk level of the user. Valid values: `HIGH`, `LOW`.
- `user_id` (String) ID of the user.

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) The ID of this resource.

## Import

Import is supported using the following syntax:

```shell
terraform import okta_user_risk.example <user_id>
```
